entries.expected_behavior: Synthetic players should exhibit realistic idle/offline transitions based on their archetype activity profile. 'Mostly Idle' players should go idle naturally; 'Hardcore' players should stay active.
entries.observed_behavior: FreshLifecycleRunner blanket-updated last_activity_tick for ALL players every tick, preventing any player from ever going idle or offline.
entries.linked_fix: scripts/simulation/FreshLifecycleRunner.php — replaced blanket keepalive with updatePlayerPresence() using PolicyBehavior::resolvePresenceState() per-player per-tick. Active players refresh last_activity_tick + last_seen_at; Idle players refresh only last_seen_at; Offline players get no refresh.

entries.expected_behavior: presenceIsStale() should detect stale presence in simulation using simulated wall-clock time so fast-forwarded game time correctly ages last_seen_at.
entries.observed_behavior: presenceIsStale() used time() (real wall-clock) which barely advances during fast simulation, so presenceIsStale() always returned false in simulation mode.
entries.linked_fix: includes/economy.php — presenceIsStale() now uses GameTime::tickStartRealUnix(GameTime::now()) when GameTime::isSimulationClockActive() is true. Production behavior unchanged (uses time() when simulation is off).
